---
title: "Working With tidycensus"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  eval = nzchar(Sys.getenv("CENSUS_API_KEY"))
)
```

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(griddy)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
```

This article is a website-only template for ACS workflows: it requires a
Census API key and live data, so it is rendered on the pkgdown site when the
key is set and skipped otherwise. It does not ship with the installed package.

```{r, fig.alt=c("Heatmap of ACS tract transition probabilities between income quintiles.", "Faceted heatmaps of ACS tract spatial Markov transition probabilities by spatial-lag quintile.", "Map of ACS tract endpoint rank mobility.")}
library(tidycensus)
library(sf)
library(spdep)

years <- c(2012, 2017, 2022)

acs <- purrr::map_dfr(years, function(y) {
  get_acs(
    geography = "tract",
    variables = "B19013_001",
    state = "CA",
    county = "San Francisco",
    year = y,
    survey = "acs5",
    geometry = TRUE
  ) |>
    transmute(
      GEOID,
      year = y,
      median_income = estimate,
      geometry
    ) |>
    filter(is.finite(median_income))
})

geography <- acs |>
  filter(year == max(year)) |>
  filter(!st_is_empty(geometry)) |>
  arrange(GEOID)

common_ids <- acs |>
  st_drop_geometry() |>
  count(GEOID) |>
  filter(n == length(years)) |>
  pull(GEOID) |>
  intersect(geography$GEOID)

panel <- acs |>
  filter(GEOID %in% common_ids) |>
  st_drop_geometry() |>
  left_join(select(geography, GEOID, geometry), by = "GEOID") |>
  st_as_sf()

geography <- geography |>
  filter(GEOID %in% common_ids) |>
  arrange(GEOID)

listw <- nb2listw(poly2nb(geography, queen = TRUE), style = "W", zero.policy = TRUE)

classes <- classify_dynamics(panel, GEOID, year, median_income, k = 5)
classic <- markov_dynamics(classes, GEOID, year, class)
spatial <- spatial_markov(panel, GEOID, year, median_income, listw = listw, k = 5)
mobility <- rank_mobility(panel, GEOID, year, median_income)

plot_transition_matrix(classic)
plot_spatial_markov(spatial)
plot_rank_mobility(mobility)
```

For package-ready examples, cache a small static panel instead of calling the
API at build time.
